name: Réputologie
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Reputology Does

Reputology is complete reputation and customer feedback management platform that offers a white label solution to agencies. It has been integrated with the Grade.us brand itself to provide an extensive suite of services for feedback management.

Source: Grade.us

Key Features

  • Helps collect and monitor customer feedback from 100+ platforms
  • Sends automated email and summary reports to team members
  • Analyzes reviews automatically to track important metrics
  • Lets you track your team’s response to reviews
  • Offers basic whitelabel services along with a premium whitelabel topup

Pricing

$40 per seat per month for up to 10 seats. $25 per seat per month for 10-100 seats. Premium white label is extra at $440 per year.

Pros

✅Offers robust analytics into reviews as well as team performance

✅Has a client center to oversee all clients for agencies

Cons

❌Platform is costly and premium white label is an extra cost for resellers

❌Doesn’t offer AI-generated responses
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

“Reputology was recommended by a member of a Facebook group I belong to as a great tool they use to monitor online reviews. I requested a demo and received an immediate response. The demo blew me away! Reputology offers the analytics that I was looking for and then some. It will definitely help our clients monitor their online reputation while addressing concerns from their customers.”

   - Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
